title: Hodge IV: Hodge Block Synthesis + Higher p Frontier

theorems.T136: Hodge L-Function Exists (S416): L_Hodge via ℓ-adic cohomology; ECL applies
theorems.T137: Hodge Shadow Bijection Strategy (S417): Hodge = shadow surjectivity; Hodge-GZ is gap
theorems.T138: Hodge p=1 via ECL (S418): Lefschetz + ECL = Hodge for p=1 PROVEN

proven: ECL for all L_Hodge (T136, Deligne Weil conjectures)
conditional: Hodge p≥2: Hodge-GZ formula + shadow surjectivity needed
summary.eml_contribution: EML explains: Lefschetz works because ECL stabilizes EML-3 and exponential sequence provides surjectivity

p2_attack.object: Attack on Hodge conjecture for p≥2

strategy.motivated_by: K3 surfaces (p=2, dimension 2): Hodge for H^{2,2}
strategy.k3_result: Mukai: algebraic K3 has all Hodge classes algebraic (partial)
strategy.eml_reading: K3 Hodge: EML-∞ cycles ↔ EML-3 H^{2,2}; 1-dimensional → bijection easier

general_p2.approach: Higher Chern classes + Hirzebruch-Riemann-Roch: connect cycle heights to L-values
general_p2.status: OPEN: no explicit Hodge-GZ formula for general fourfolds

intermediate_jacobians.abel_jacobi: Abel-Jacobi map: Z^p(X) → J^p(X): algebraic cycles → intermediate Jacobians
intermediate_jacobians.eml: Abel-Jacobi: EML-∞ cycles → EML-3 Jacobians → EML-3 torsion points
intermediate_jacobians.connection: Abel-Jacobi is the shadow map; Hodge = surjectivity of Abel-Jacobi on Hodge classes

eml_picture.object: Complete EML depth picture for Hodge conjecture

depth_map.EML_0: Boolean flags: which cohomology classes are rational = EML-0 decision
depth_map.EML_2: Height pairings: ĥ(Z₁,Z₂) = EML-2 (real measurement on cycles)
depth_map.EML_3: L_Hodge(X,p,s): EML-3; Hodge classes H^{p,p} = EML-3
depth_map.EML_inf: All algebraic cycles Z ∈ CH^p(X): EML-∞

eml_picture.bijection: Hodge = shadow surjectivity: every EML-3 Hodge class is shadow of EML-∞ algebraic cycle
eml_picture.ecl_role: ECL confirms EML-3 stability of L_Hodge; necessary for the shadow framework to work
eml_picture.remaining: Shadow surjectivity for p≥2 is the content of Hodge; EML identifies but doesn't prove it
eml_picture.new_theorem: T139: Hodge EML Complete Picture (S419): full depth map; Hodge = EML-∞→EML-3 surjectivity

verdicts.block: Hodge block complete: T136-T138+T139; p=1 proven; p≥2 framework established
verdicts.p2: K3 fourfold is the best target for p=2; Mukai partial; general open
verdicts.eml: EML depth map for Hodge: EML-0 (rational?), EML-2 (heights), EML-3 (L_Hodge), EML-∞ (cycles)

key_theorem: Hodge EML Complete Picture (T139, S419): Hodge block summary: T136 (L_Hodge), T137 (shadow strategy), T138 (p=1 proven). Complete EML depth map for Hodge: EML-0 (rational flag), EML-2 (heights), EML-3 (L_Hodge/Hodge classes), EML-∞ (algebraic cycles). Hodge conjecture = shadow surjectivity: every EML-3 Hodge class is shadow of EML-∞ cycle. ECL (T136) stabilizes the EML-3 side; shadow surjectivity for p≥2 is the open problem. Best next target: K3 fourfolds (Mukai partial results) and intermediate Jacobians (Abel-Jacobi map). Hodge block (S416-S419) COMPLETE.
rabbit_hole_log: Block summary: T136-T139; p=1 proven; p≥2 framework
Complete EML depth map: {0,2,3,∞} for Hodge (EML-1 absent)
Hodge = shadow surjectivity: EML-∞ cycles → EML-3 Hodge classes
p=2 target: K3 fourfolds + Abel-Jacobi intermediate Jacobians
NEW: T139 Hodge EML Complete Picture — Hodge block COMPLETE (S416-S419)
